description: The look of this murcia bag is contemporary and the feel is of pure luxury. Created using exotic material, intricate embroideries and international silhouettes, it's vibrant hues and rich textures are just some of the unique features of this murcia bag. This bag is a must have for every woman with style and panache for fashion.Made of high quality textile with casement liningMirror work on the corner in the frontOne main zippered chamber a sub-chamber insideComfortable handles stitched to the bagBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleaner
